{{CargoRelic
|name=Dimensional Wanted Order S-8
|class_id=20869
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles occupy space-time gaps, Earth's will issues this wanted order to encourage travelers to go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=13
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +1<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +1<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss2=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +2<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss3=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss4=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss7=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80<br> (Awakened)
}}
